# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

- [ ] kong-configuration.yaml
    - [ ] apiVersion
    - [ ] kind
      - [ ] type
      - [ ] config
        - [ ] name
        - [ ] routes
        - [ ] tags
        - [ ] plugins
            - [ ] name
            - [ ] route
            - [ ] service
            - [ ] config
              - [ ] name
              - [ ] prefix
      - [ ] service
        - [ ] name
        - [ ] url
      - [ ] upstream
        - [ ] target
        - [ ] hash_on


- [ ] kong.conf
    - [ ] upstream: kong_upstream
    - [ ] name: proxy_upstream
    - [ ] server
    - [ ] server: 8081:8000
    - [ ] name: 8000
